caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVEI DO SHIT" is speaking into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in a room filled with framed photographs on the wall behind him and a white mannequin to his right. In the background, clothing racks and various items of apparel are visible. On-screen logos include a circular emblem on the left featuring the word "RADIO" and a red text logo on the right that reads "REDDLY TOT". Across the sequence, the man's facial expressions and mouth movements shift as he speaks, while the camera and surrounding environment remain static. He maintains a focused expression, glancing slightly to the side and then forward as he continues his conversation.
